news.title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
news.summary: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

news.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
news.summary: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

news.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
news.summary: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

news.title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
news.summary: The startup also announced a $5M 'rescue fund' to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

news.title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
news.summary: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.
